title: New YKHC facilities to support healthcare infrastructure
summary: In late January 2023, Yukon-Kuskokwim Health Corporation President and CEO Dan Winkelman announced, on behalf of the Board of Directors, several new facilities that will be completed by YKHC over the next few years. YKHC will be constructing five new village health clinics, including the expansion of a...

title: Nominations Open for the 2023 Board of Directors Election
summary: Nominations are now open for Koniag Shareholders seeking election to the Board of Directors. Applications must be received by 5:00 p.m. AKST and can be downloaded here, emailing elections@koniag.com, or calling 800.658.3818. 2023-Nomination-Form-digital-v.8… Source

title: NANA Elders’ Settlement Trust Announces 2023 Distribution
summary: The trustees of the NANA Elders’ Settlement Trust — or NEST — voted to issue a dividend of $1,500 per Elder for 2023. The dividend will be paid on or around Feb. 9, 2023. Elders who are NANA shareholders with voting rights and 65 or older as of Dec. 31, 2022, will receive the dividend. Those who hav...
